# Links

## Inline Links

Visit [mdpress](https://github.com/Skel-Tech/mdpress) for the source code.

Here is a [link with title](https://example.com "Example Site") that includes hover text.

## Multiple Links in a Paragraph

Check out [GitHub](https://github.com), [GitLab](https://gitlab.com), or [Bitbucket](https://bitbucket.org) for hosting.

## Bare URLs

If auto-linking is supported: https://example.com

## Links in Lists

- [Documentation](https://example.com/docs)
- [API Reference](https://example.com/api)
- [Support](https://example.com/support)
